name: Kraft Heinz
analysis: KHC has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 11% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Trade idea: entry $24.2200, stop $21.7423, target $31.6530 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
